results.title: Gold, Silver Prices Fall Up To 4 Pc Amid Geopolitical Tensions
results.description: Mumbai: Gold and silver prices traded lower on Monday, with precious metals falling by nearly 4 per cent amid escalating tensions in the West Asia

results.title: Social Media Influencer Rachna Gurjar’s House Robbed Of ₹8 Lakh 2 Days After Flaunting Heavy Gold Jewellery On Instagram Reel
results.description: A theft worth around ₹7–8 lakh was reported at the house of village-based YouTuber Rachna Gurjar in Shivpuri district, Madhya Pradesh. Burglars allegedly entered her home at night, locked the couple’s bedroom from outside, and stole cash, gold, silver and other valuables. Rachna has continued posting videos, sharing updates on the case as police investigate CCTV footage and search for the accused.

results.title: Sona Mohapatra on ‘Peddi’ row: Toxic masculinity’s called romance in such films
results.description: Mumbai, June 8, 2026 Amidst the conversation around Janhvi Kapoor’s overlysexualised appearance in the latest Telugu release “Peddi”, singer Sona Mohapatra has said that heroines are often reduced to “decoration to be sexualised and objectified” while toxic masculinity is packaged as romance. Mohapatra, who does not shy away from speaking her mind, shared a video [...] The post Sona Mohapatra on ‘Peddi’ row: Toxic masculinity’s called romance in such films appeared first on Yes Punjab News .

results.title: Infinix Hot 70 Pro India Launch Timeline Leaked; Could Feature Dimensity 7100 Chip, 6,000mAh Battery
results.description: Infinix Hot 70 Pro is said to launch in India between July and August. It could feature a 6,000mAh battery and a 50-megapixel rear camera unit. It is expected to ship with a MediaTek Dimensity 7100 5G chipset. This model could arrive as the second device in the Infinix Hot 70 series.
